description_long: This is a rectangular wooden briefcase with a hinged lid, finished in a light beige wood grain and featuring gold-colored metal hardware for the latch and hinges. The lid is partially open, revealing a red velvet or felt-lined interior that securely holds a variety of colorful, geometric objects, possibly jewelry or tokens, each with distinct shapes and pastel hues. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with no visible handles or external pockets, giving it a minimalist and elegant appearance. The gold latch is centrally located on the front, providing both security and a decorative accent. The corners are sharp and unreinforced, maintaining the clean lines of the box. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, high-quality item suitable for personal valuables or presentation purposes.
description: A light wood briefcase with gold hardware, a red velvet-lined interior, and colorful geometric objects inside. Minimalist, smooth exterior with a central gold latch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, gold latch, and the red velvet-lined interior with colorful geometric objects.
description_view_1: Left side view with the lid partially open, revealing the thickness of the wood and a glimpse of the interior contents.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid closed, displaying the plain wood surface and gold hinges.
description_view_3: Right side view with the lid partially open, showing the side profile and some interior objects.
attribute_handle_type: None visible; the briefcase does not have an external handle.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Gold-colored metal latch located at the center front; appears to be a simple clasp mechanism.
